name: Grav
description: Fast, flexible flat-file CMS with no database requirement

description.value: Fast, flexible flat-file CMS with no database requirement

github-stars.comment: Most starred PHP CMS on GitHub

cms-type.comment: Traditional CMS with Twig templating; can be used as headless via plugins but not primary design

database-support.comment: Flat-file architecture with no database required; uses file system for content storage

api-type.comment: No built-in API; headless usage requires third-party plugins like page-as-data

multi-tenancy.comment: Can configure single Grav installation to run multiple sites

static-site-generation.comment: Grav is a dynamic CMS; static export not a core feature

content-types.comment: Page types defined via templates and blueprints

custom-fields.comment: YAML-based front matter headers allow custom fields for any page

field-types.comment: Supports text, Markdown rich text, media, and modular/repeating content blocks via blueprints

content-relationships.comment: Taxonomies enable content relationships via tags, categories, and custom taxonomies

nested-components.comment: Modular pages allow composing single pages from multiple modular components

content-validation.comment: Blueprints support validation rules for form fields

embedded-interactives.comment: Shortcodes and modular content allow embedding interactive elements

content-versioning.comment: Via Git Sync plugin or premium Revisions Pro plugin; native Git integration for version control

draft-publish.comment: Pages can be set to published or unpublished in Options tab

scheduled-publishing.comment: Publish date can be set in page frontmatter; Scheduler plugin adds more advanced scheduling

approval-workflows.comment: No built-in multi-step approval workflow; community requests exist but not planned for core

audit-logging.comment: No built-in audit logging; Git history provides some tracking if using Git Sync

media-library.comment: Admin plugin includes media manager; images folder acts as cache

image-transformations.comment: Dynamic image manipulation via Gregwar Image Library: resize, crop, compression, effects, grayscale, etc.

external-media-storage.comment: Media stored in file system; no native S3/Cloudinary integration

video-support.comment: Native video file support in media system

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported as vector media type

folder-organization.comment: Media organized via folder structure; supports subfolders in media repository

role-based-access.comment: Admin plugin provides granular permissions: admin.plugins, admin.themes, admin.configuration, etc.

granular-permissions.comment: Permissions can be set per admin section (system, site, plugins, themes, etc.) but not field-level

sso-saml.comment: Via SimpleSAMLphp-Login plugin for SAML authentication

team-collaboration.comment: No built-in comments, assignments, or notifications for content teams

audience-restrictions.comment: Login plugin enables restricting page access to authenticated users; permissions plugin adds page-level access control

typescript-sdk.comment: No official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK; PHP-based CMS

content-type-sdk.comment: Blueprints define content types in YAML; can be version controlled

cli-tools.comment: GPM (Grav Package Manager) CLI for installation, updates, cache clearing, backups

local-development.comment: Zero-config local development; unzip and run with PHP

webhooks.comment: Scheduler Webhook plugin provides HTTP endpoints; Git Sync integrates with repository webhooks

plugin-system.comment: Extensive plugin ecosystem via GPM; event hook architecture for custom plugins

admin-ui-customization.comment: Admin panel customizable via plugins and theme inheritance

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive documentation at learn.getgrav.org with tutorials, API reference, and examples

frontend-frameworks.comment: Community integration with Gatsby exists; no official integrations with modern JS frameworks

search-integration.comment: SimpleSearch plugin for basic search; Algolia Pro premium plugin available

preview-mode.comment: Draft Preview plugin enables previewing unpublished pages in admin

ecommerce-integration.comment: Snipcart integration available; various e-commerce plugins

analytics-integration.comment: Admin Statistics dashboard; Google Analytics plugins available

ai-features.comment: Premium AI Translate ($75) and AI Pro ($75) plugins for translation and AI services

response-caching.comment: Intelligent caching system with automatic cache invalidation

global-regions.comment: Self-hosted only; no managed multi-region deployment

free-tier.comment: Core CMS is free and open source; premium plugins available separately

pricing-model.comment: Core is free; premium plugins $25-$100 each (one-time purchase)

commercial-support.comment: Premium plugins include support; community forums for free tier

enterprise-features.comment: No enterprise tier or SLA; premium plugins provide advanced features individually
